name: Baked Ground Beef Pasta

ingredients.item: Salt and black pepper, to taste

method: Prepare the pasta according to package directions. Drain and place in an ovenproof baking dish.
Heat olive oil in a large pot and then gently sauté the onion until transparent. Add in ground beef, mushrooms,
garlic and tomato. Stir and cook on low heat for about 10 minutes. When the meat is almost done, add in the
Toss everything with the pasta. Add in the mushroom soup and stir to combine.
Whisk the egg with mozzarella cheese and spread all over the pasta equally.
Bake in a preheated to 350 F oven for 10 minutes or until the cheese turns golden.
Lazy Sundays are perfect for spending a few hours preparing and cooking this classic dish. It will provide you with
an abundant amount of leftovers for the rest of the week, and your family will love coming home to it.
